---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for keel-harness
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem you are trying to solve

A clear description of the user pain. What workflow does not work today, or
works poorly?

## Proposed solution

How could keel-harness address this? File-level concrete (which hook, which
workflow MD, which template) is best.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why they were rejected (or why this
proposal is better).

## Kernel scope check

`keel-harness` keeps its kernel narrow (see CONTRIBUTING.md "Kernel scope").
Does this proposal fit kernel scope, or would it be better as:

- A separate plugin (recommended for personal workflow features)
- A `[CANDIDATE]` marker in `CHANGELOG.md` (for future consideration)
- An external integration (no change to keel-harness needed)

## Additional context

Links to related issues, prior art in other projects, or screenshots.
